title: bupleurum tenuissimum var. genuinum
intro: Bupleurum tenuissimum var. genuinum, also known as Chai Hu Qiao Gan or Thin Bupleurum, is a plant species within the Bupleurum genus. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties have been associated with various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, inflammation, and stress, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Bupleurum tenuissimum var. genuinum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
